title: Mad Pixels 16x
description: The 16x version of Mad Pixels. Make your Minecraft world simpler and more cheerful with the Mad Pixels resource pack!
body:
![Mad Pixels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bddfd47c8e29c4cd40bfafbba82a5b8dc7cae938.png)

**Make your Minecraft world simpler and more cheerful with the Mad Pixels resource pack! It is a pack that can be used for any purpose - from adventuring to modern building.**

The idea of this pack is to make your world more cartoon-like and more vibrant with textures that go easy on the eyes but at the same time are not too minimalistic.

Many textures, although different in style when compared to the default ones, look familiar. At the same time, many textures are more experimental and diverge from the norm, for example, the robot-like iron golem or the loading-style block destroying animation. Altogether, in this pack you'll see many surprises.

![Sharp and clean textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10a814f2b593ba54d08fda3f2002a09c56048757.png)

These are the words that best describe the 16x version of this pack. The 64x version has more rounded textures, but still in a pixelated retro style, while 1024x is pushing the limits of how far this pack can go.

![Carefully handcrafted simplicity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cebba98e95615150dc0d68088c36873dbb24eac1.png)

Originally Mad Pixels was released as a 16x pack in 2015. The core idea of this pack has always stayed the same, but over the years there have been many small tweaks, adjustments and additions. Everything is made "by hand" without AI or any other sort of external assistance.

![Available in different resolutions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20b7558ad51b67a3c4e325c54bd98bd34e580cea.png)

Here are the links if you want to check out the other versions of Mad Pixels:

- [Mad Pixels 64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mad-pixels-64x)
- [Mad Pixels 1024x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mad-pixels)
